summary: Iteration 126: CRITICAL Unified Signal Flow Test - All 10 tests PASSED. Verified that POST /api/concierge/request correctly creates entries in all 3 collections (admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes) with matching cross-reference IDs.

TEST_01_concierge_request_creates_all_en.details: POST /api/concierge/request returns all 4 IDs: request_id, ticket_id, notification_id, inbox_id

TEST_02_notification_created_in_admin_no.details: Notification found in admin_notifications with type='concierge_request', title='New Concierge® Request: Enjoy', status='unread'

TEST_03_ticket_created_in_service_desk.details: Ticket found in service_desk_tickets with correct category, status='new', subject='Concierge® Request: ...'

TEST_04_entry_created_in_channel_intakes.details: Entry found in channel_intakes (unified inbox) with channel='web', status='new', correct pillar

TEST_05_all_ids_match_across_collections.details: ALL CROSS-REFERENCES MATCH - notification.ticket_id matches ticket_id, notification.inbox_id matches inbox_id, ticket.notification_id matches notification_id, ticket.inbox_id matches inbox_id, inbox.ticket_id matches ticket_id, inbox.notification_id matches notification_id

TEST_06_enjoy_pillar_request_flows_corre.details: ENJOY pillar 'Ask Concierge' requests correctly appear in all 3 collections: admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes

critical_code_review_comments: concierge_routes.py create_general_concierge_request function correctly implements the unified flow: 1) Creates notification in admin_notifications, 2) Creates ticket in service_desk_tickets, 3) Creates entry in channel_intakes
All 3 collections have matching cross-reference IDs (notification_id, ticket_id, inbox_id)
mira_routes.py create_service_desk_ticket function also updated to include notifications and channel_intakes entries
unified_signal_flow.py module provides a centralized process_signal function for universal signal handling
seed_data_creation: Test concierge requests created during testing with unique emails
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified Signal Flow is working correctly. POST /api/concierge/request creates entries in all 3 collections (admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes) with matching cross-reference IDs. The CRITICAL bug where Enjoy requests via 'Ask Concierge' were NOT appearing in notifications, service desk, or unified inbox has been FIXED.

verified_fixes.unified_signal_flow: FIXED - All signals now flow through: Notification → Service Desk → Unified Inbox
verified_fixes.enjoy_pillar_requests: FIXED - Enjoy pillar 'Ask Concierge' requests now appear in all 3 collections
verified_fixes.cross_reference_ids: VERIFIED - All entries have matching notification_id, ticket_id, inbox_id

api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/concierge/request - Creates entries in all 3 collections
GET /api/tickets - Returns service desk tickets with cross-references
GET /api/channels/intakes - Returns unified inbox entries with cross-references
